Workspace statistics

Compare formal exam activity, answer quality, and content difficulty across the visible workspace scope.

Open personal dashboard

Global user comparison

Compare non-administrator users through grouped KPI bars, and narrow the comparison to a specific group when needed.

Global stats are limited to the currently visible workspace scope.

Only non-administrator users are represented in the comparison chart.

KPI selection

The first active KPI defines descending user order. Additional KPIs only add grouped columns.

By question type

Where the visible workspace performs well and where accuracy drops.

Exam performance

Attempt volume, participating users, and average score by exam.

Hardest topics

Topics with the lowest official accuracy across submitted attempts.

Hardest tags

Tag-level friction points across the visible workspace scope.
